name: Chinese Noodle Salad with Summer Squash and C
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cabbage or bok choy; shredded
1/2 cup Daikon or other radish; sliced
1/4 cup Scallions or chives; thinly sliced
6 tbsp Dry-roasted cashews; chopped to garnish
Squash or chive blossoms, to garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare the dressing, combine oil, soy sauce, tomato juice, vinegar and apple juice in a bowl; mix well. Set aside.
2. Toss noodles, cabbage, squash, zucchini, daikon, scallions, carrots, garlic, sesame seeds, nutmeg and reserved dressing together. Garnish with cashews and blossoms if desired.
